DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT PELOSI,JR. PAUL FRANCIS

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PAUL FRANCIS PELOSI, JR.'S AMENDED MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A CROSS COMPLAINT IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MR. PELOSI MOVES FOR LEAVE TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 473. (NOTICE OF MOTION, P. 1:26-27.) HOWEVER, CCP 473 IS NOT THE CORRECT STATUTE FOR SEEKING LEAVE TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT. "AS A GENERAL RULE, THE TRIAL COURT MAY CONSIDER ONLY THE GROUNDS STATED IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION. [CITATIONS.]" (LURI V. GREENWALD (2003) 107 CAL.APP.4TH 1119, 1125.) ALSO, MOVING PARTY SHOULD ATTACH THE PROPOSED CROSS-COMPLAINT TO HIS DECLARATION. (WEIL & BROWN, CAL. PRACTICE GUIDE: CIV. PROC. BEFORE TRIAL, 6:561; SEE PELOSI DECL., P. 2:1-2.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-11-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED DENYING DEFT. PAUL FRANCIS PELOSI, JR'S AMENDED MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRENNAN, ELYN P AN INDIVIDUAL

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOSEPH L. SCHATZ, ESQ., 415.677.9151, FOR PLAINTIFF ELYN BRENNAN; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PAUL FRANCIS PELOSI, JR.'S Amended Motion For Leave To File A Cross Complaint is denied, without prejudice. Mr. Pelosi moves for leave to file a Cross-Complaint pursuant to CCP 473. (Notice of Motion, p. 1:26-27.) However, CCP 473 is not the correct statute for seeking leave to file a Cross-Complaint. "As a general rule, the trial court may consider only the grounds stated in the notice of motion. [Citations.]" (Luri v. Greenwald (2003) 107 Cal.App.4th 1119, 1125.) Also, moving party should attach the proposed Cross-Complaint to his declaration. (Weil & Brown, Cal. Practice Guide: Civ. Proc. Before Trial, 6:561; see Pelosi Decl., p. 2:1-2.) Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File A X-Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-14-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph L. Schatz, Esq. of the Law Office of Joseph Schatz, Tel. 415.677.9151, for plaintiff and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT PAUL FRANCIS PELOSI, JR.'s Motion For Leave To File A cross-Complaint is Denied without prejudice. The motion was not timely filed on February 21, 2013 per Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
